name: improve-audit-usability-report-presentation
title: Improve audit usability and report presentation
description: Improve the audit tool's user-facing run flow and report presentation around three slices: input/output UX, report overview, and evidence/error navigation.
creator: Hao

subtasks.title: Smooth launch and output UX
subtasks.notes: Normalize output paths, print a clear run summary, and improve optional dependency diagnostics.

subtasks.title: 复核概览 first screen
subtasks.notes: Add a compact 复核概览 to Markdown and HTML reports with risk, counts, coverage, and top actions.

subtasks.title: Evidence navigation and error recovery
subtasks.notes: Add stable anchors, link top actions to evidence details, and improve failed/limited recovery guidance.

notes: MVP should avoid new detection logic. Focus on making existing audit behavior easier to run, easier to understand, and easier to recover from when failures occur.
